Agricultural machinery procurement - tractors and garden equipment primary focus, trailers are agricultural accessories
Motorcycle procurement is primary - trailers are just transport accessories for the motorcycles
All-Terrain Vehicle procurement is primary - trailers are just cargo accessories for the ATVs
Recovery vehicle/truck procurement is primary - semi-trailer is part of recovery combination, not standalone

summary.notes: Found 8 duplicate pairs, 5 false positives (non-trailer procurements), multiple generic/placeholder type descriptions, and several multi-type tenders that should use additional type slots. Most categorization appears accurate.
